properties.NAME: Sealy City Limits
properties.SOURCE: 2019 City Limits ETJ Map - 24x36 Scale.pdf (Esri ArcMap GeoPDF)
properties.NOTE: Adopted Aug 6 2019 per Ord 2019-11. Excludes any internal holes. From PDF vector layer "Sealy City Limit".

properties.NAME: Sealy ETJ + City (envelope)
properties.NOTE: ETJ outer boundary as digitized from PDF dash markers. Contiguous + SE extension. Includes city limits area.
